Human.abilities: One extra Edge at creation (ignore requirements except prerequisites)
Human.notes: Most common species in the galaxy; adaptable and versatile

Twi'lek.abilities: +1 Persuasion, Low-light vision, -1 Quirk: Lekku make some armor and helmets awkward
Twi'lek.notes: From Ryloth; lekku (head-tails) express emotion; often targeted by slavers

Wookiee.abilities: d6 Strength, Claws (Str+d4), Low-light vision; Cannot speak Basic (Minor), -2 Charisma with strangers
Wookiee.notes: From Kashyyyk; fierce warriors; life-debt tradition; Shyriiwook only

Trandoshan.abilities: Climbing d6, Regeneration (1 wound/day), Claws (Str+d6); Cold-blooded (-4 resist cold), -2 Charisma
Trandoshan.notes: Reptilian hunters from Trandosha; bounty hunter culture

Bothan.abilities: +2 Streetwise, Low-light vision; Curious—can't resist seeking intel (Minor)
Bothan.notes: Famous spy network; "Many Bothans died" for Death Star plans

Duros.abilities: Piloting d6, Astrogation d6, Low-light vision; Slender build (Pace 5)
Duros.notes: From Duro; spacefaring pioneers; large red eyes, hairless blue skin

Rodian.abilities: +2 Notice, Infravision, Claws (Str+d4); -2 Charisma (insectoid appearance unsettles many)
Rodian.notes: From Rodia; hunting culture; compound eyes, antennae

Zabrak.abilities: +2 to resist Fear, Low-light vision, Two hearts (+1 Toughness); Stubborn (Minor)
Zabrak.notes: From Iridonia; distinctive facial horns and tattoos; durable

Mirialan.abilities: +1 Faith or Focus, +2 resist cold; Cultural tattoos
Mirialan.notes: From Mirial; often Force-sensitive; traditional facial markings

Chiss.abilities: d6 Smarts, Low-light vision; -2 Charisma (cold, aloof demeanor)
Chiss.notes: From Csilla; expansionist; blue skin, glowing red eyes

Droid.abilities: Construct (ignore wound modifiers, disease, poison), Immune to poison/disease, Integrated systems (+1); Vulnerable to ion/EMP (-4 resist electricity), -2 Charisma with organics
Droid.notes: Artificial beings; programmable; no fatigue from sleep

Togruta.abilities: +2 Notice (spatial awareness via montrals), Natural weapons (bite Str+d4), Low-light vision; Pack mentality—strongly Loyal to their group (Minor)
Togruta.notes: From Shili; Ahsoka Tano's species; montrals provide echolocation; pack hunters

Nautolan.abilities: Swimming d6, Hold breath 15+ min, +2 Notice in water (electroreception via head tendrils); Dehydration—must immerse in water 1 hr per 24 hrs or become Fatigued
Nautolan.notes: From Glee Anselm; amphibious; tendrils sense pheromones and emotions; Kit Fisto's species

Kel Dor.abilities: Darkvision, +4 resist vacuum/low pressure, Common Knowledge d6, Low-light vision; Oxygen toxicity—must wear breath mask off Dorin (Major)
Kel Dor.notes: From Dorin; Plo Koon's species; antiox mask and goggles required off-world

Lasat.abilities: d6 Strength, +1 Size, Low-light vision; Code of Honor (Minor), -2 Charisma (outsider)
Lasat.notes: From Lasan; Zeb's species; large, strong, honor-bound warriors

Mon Calamari.abilities: Aquatic (cannot drown, Swimming d6, full swim Pace), Low-light vision; Must immerse in water 1 hr per 24 hrs or become Fatigued
Mon Calamari.notes: From Mon Cala; Admiral Ackbar's species; shipwrights; large eyes, webbed hands

Sullustan.abilities: Piloting d6, Low-light vision, +2 Notice in darkness (echolocation); Pace 5
Sullustan.notes: From Sullust; Nien Nunb's species; natural pilots; cave dwellers with large ears

Devaronian.notes: From Devaron; horned humanoids; merchants and smugglers
